description: Korea's leading manufacturer of semiconductor test sockets (IC Test Sockets) and probe components under the LEENO brand. Products: IC test sockets for semiconductor testing, LEENO PIN probe components, cooling lids, probe heads, and PCB for medical catheter applications. Developing next-gen: TSV probe cards, Tri-Temperature Test probes, 100GHz-compatible sockets. Customers include Qualcomm, TSMC, Samsung Electronics, NVIDIA. Founded 1997, KOSDAQ listed.

competitors: ACCRETECH/Tokyo Seimitsu (CMP-0001) - adjacent competitor: Leeno's probe components serve the same wafer test ecosystem
Japan's probe card makers - NHK Spring (CMP-0055), Micronics Japan
_externalRelationships.notes: Market cap: 735.4B KRW. KOSDAQ rank ~11 by market cap. FY2025 operating profit: ~177B KRW (+42.51% YoY). 2025 Q3 cumulative: revenue +47.8%, operating profit +56.7%, net profit +49.9%. 1-year stock return: +113.25%. Leeno's test sockets and probes are used in conjunction with wafer probers (like Accretech's) - the probes physically contact the wafer during testing. Leeno is a key ecosystem player in semiconductor testing alongside prober manufacturers. Wasatch Advisors (US) holds 9.08% stake.

_metadata.dataSource: FnGuide, Leeno IR, Wikipedia, Investing.com, Eugene Securities
